Note.title: Note
Note.description: A single note document created by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the note doc.

content.description: Main notepad text content of the note.

ownerId.description: Firebase UID of user who created this note.

isPinned.description: Whether the note is pinned in user's list.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the note was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the note was last modified.

notes.description: User notes containing text and formatting state synced to Firebase.
